attributes.action: To reinstate roads and highways to a safe and satisfactory condition.
attributes.additional_details: Road safety is paramount for obvious reasons, road safety campaigns have been around since the invention of the motor car. Swerving around patches of broken up road and potholes surly isn’t beneficial to road safety. Road markings are also an issue with many white lines, mini roundabouts and road junctions with barely visible markings. Also the quality and standard of repairs is also an issue.once repairs  have been completed they often brake up within a few months, the nation’s highways are a disgrace.
attributes.background: I want the government to address the appalling condition of our roads, what are we paying our road fund licence and not receiving value for money.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Legislate for the repair of potholes within a time frame in the UK.
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757761

Launch an inquiry into road maintenance & publish road tax spending
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/760470
